title: The Haj Committee Act, 2002
full_text: The Haj Committee Act, 2002 हज समिति अधिनियम, 2002 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 200235 Act Number: 35 Enactment Date: 2002-06-11 Act Year: 2002 Short Title: The Haj Committee Act, 2002 Hindi Title: हज समिति अधिनियम, 2002 Long Title: An Act to establish a Haj Committee of India and State Haj Committees for making arrangements for the pilgrimage of Muslims for Haj, and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Minority Affairs Enforcement Date: 05-12-2002 Notification: 5th December, 2002, vide notification No. S.O. 1267(E), dated by 5th December, 2002, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Schedule 1.
